name_en: In stock 22k DUMA backpack, women's bag. Fall in love with this calfskin at first sight, this white is worry-free, it's easy to keep clean! The capacity is super impressive~ Pair this with a summer floral dress for an absolutely fairy-like look! It's also super fairy to wear in winter 🧚🏻‍♀️ The key point is: visually, the volume is only slightly larger than a chubby bag, but it's super cute and small on the body, yet the capacity is so impressive. Phone, card holder, water bottle, umbrella, and other small items can all be easily packed in. The front magnetic snap can hold a card holder and keys/lip balm, both fairy and practical! Dimensions: 18×18×12cm
